name: SQL Fundamentals
goal: Query and manage relational databases with SQL
units: Unit 1: Relational Model - tables, rows, columns, keys, relations
Unit 2: Basic Queries - SELECT, FROM, WHERE, ORDER BY, LIMIT
Unit 3: Filtering - AND/OR/NOT, IN, BETWEEN, LIKE, NULL handling
Unit 4: Aggregation - COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX, GROUP BY, HAVING
Unit 5: Joins - INNER, LEFT, RIGHT, FULL OUTER, self-join
Unit 6: Subqueries and CTEs - correlated subqueries, WITH clause
Unit 7: Data Modification - INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, transactions
Unit 8: Schema Design - normalization, indexes, foreign keys
